paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 22, 2026.
There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a headline regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights from PR Newswire. The news item is dated July 23, 2026.

There have been recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as a SCHEDULE 13G filing and multiple 8-K forms related to the issuance of convertible senior notes. Additionally, there have been 4 new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a discussion thread about Fermi America and a post about Google's raised FY26 CapEx guide.
